content.en:
Heavenly Shield Ancient Demon, Heavenly Sword Ancient Demon, these two brothers, Ye Tian is still very familiar with,

At the beginning, in the space-time projection, Duowei Ancient Demon was killed in battle, and the two brothers gained a lot of benefits, and later wanted to kill him and seize the remaining space-time level Extreme Dao Ultimate Treasure Fragments, but they were killed by him.

Of course.

The space-time projection is false, and these two ultimate ancient demons naturally don't know him, and they have nothing to do with him.

Rumble!!!!

The Heavenly Shield Ancient Demon, the Heavenly Sword Ancient Demon and a group of Ancient Demon-level powerhouses came across the void, and their terrifying aura made those Ultimate Extreme Masters of this era tremble, they only felt despair, the breath of each of these Ancient Demons far surpassed them, not to mention those Ultimate Ancient Demons, a wisp of breath could kill them countless times.

......

"Can the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Honor beat them?"

"One Two Zero" Doomsday Extreme Venerable, Shadow Sand Extreme Venerable, they are all worried, they all know that the Heavenly Shield Ancient Demon and the Heavenly Sword Ancient Demon are not comparable to the previous Ultimate Ancient Demons, their strength is too terrifying, and they are definitely the top Ultimate Ancient Demons.

If Ye Tiandu was defeated, would these two Ultimate Ancient Demons destroy this era and kill them all?

Even if they don't kill them, they will be reduced to slave-like existences, serving these ancient demon clans.

Therefore, they are all expecting Ye Tian to win.

However, whether Ye Tian can defeat them or not, these Ultimate Extreme Venerables have no confidence at all, after all, no matter how demonic Ye Tian is, it has not taken too long to break through the Extreme Dao Ultimate Extreme Venerable, which is equivalent to a new Ultimate Ancient Demon!

"Heavenly Shield Ancient Demon, Heavenly Sword Ancient Demon, are you looking for trouble?"

Ye Tian stared at the two ultimate ancient demons and said coldly.

Now.

The Heavenly Shield Ancient Demon stood in front of him, and a set of armor appeared on his body, which was not a real armor, but was condensed by a space-time level extreme path ultimate arcane.

A dense golden point of light appeared around the Heavenly Sword Ancient Demon, and that golden point of light gradually turned into a tiny sword light, which was his famous time-space-level extreme ultimate arcane - Billions of Sword Techniques!

Tiandun Ancient Demon Dao: "You are the Ten Thousand Law Extreme Venerable, you dare to kill the ultimate ancient demon of our ancient demon clan, you want to be the enemy of our ancient demon clan, if you are willing to be controlled by us, we can not kill you." "

"It's up to you?"

Ye Tian sneered.

"Look for death!" The Heavenly Sword Ancient Demon couldn't help it, and directly urged his own billions of sword mangjutsu.

Rumble!!!

Hundreds of millions of swords erupted, each sword had the lethality to kill the peak ancient demon-level powerhouse in seconds, and hundreds of millions of swords were superimposed, as if this piece of time and space had been erased.

And at this moment, Ye Tian made a move, and a huge Extreme Dao space-time ball protected the territory of the human race, resisting hundreds of millions of swords.

Thundered!!!!!

The terrifying aftermath of the battle made other areas crumble, and the onlookers were far away, but they were still shocked and vomited blood, and they could only keep retreating, otherwise they would definitely be wiped out.

"This is the strength of the Ultimate Ancient Demon, it's so terrifying, we can't even bear the aftermath!"

Doomsday Jizun wiped the blood from the corner of his mouth and sighed.

......

"Extreme Path Space-Time Sword Blade!"

Li Changsheng unleashed his own space-time level Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane, the lethality of this space-time level Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane was very terrifying, but the Heavenly Shield Ancient Demon resisted this move for the Heavenly Sword Ancient Demon.

Rumble!

The Extreme Space-Time Sword Blade stood on the body of the Heavenly Shield Ancient Demon, but it did not break the defense on its body, but it also shocked him.

"It's worthy of two top-notch ultimate ancient demons, one-on-one, I can defeat them, but it's not easy to kill them!"

Ye Tian decided to cast the mutilated version of the seventh form of the final form that he had realized not long ago.

In this way, he was sure to kill these two top-notch Ultimate Ancient Demons.

"The seventh form, the final form, open!"

Ye Tian's body was instantly filled with the aura of finality, and the aura on his body was instantly many times terrifying.

"It's the !! of the Seventh Form"

The Heavenly Shield Ancient Demon's pupils shrank, as if he had seen a nightmare.

Once, the Dovi Ancient Demon used his seventh form to kill all directions, and they still remember it vividly.

And at this moment, Ye Tian was like a Duowei Ancient Demon, and he even cast his seventh form.

After casting the seventh form, Ye Tian immediately cast the Extreme Dao Time and Space Escape Light, and instantly killed in front of the Heavenly Shield Ancient Demon.

No matter how amazing the defense of the Heavenly Shield Ancient Demon was, in front of the seventh form and the Extreme Path Space-Time Sword Blade, it was like papier-mâché...........

The blade slashed through the body of the Heavenly Shield Ancient Demon, directly smashing it to pieces, and the terrifying power directly annihilated his vitality.

With just one move, the Heavenly Shield Ancient Demon fell.

The Heavenly Sword Ancient Demon still wanted to escape, but he was also killed by Ye Tianxuan.

After killing these two Ultimate Ancient Demons, Li Changsheng unleashed the Extreme Dao Ultimate Sword Realm, enveloping all the Ancient Demon-level powerhouses and instantly obliterating them.

A group of ancient demons turned into corpses one after another, and soon ten seconds passed, and Ye Tian's duplicate body finally collapsed.

Immediately afterwards, another copy of Ye Tian's body appeared and took away the corpses of these ultimate ancient demons and ancient demon-level powerhouses.

And the wealth they had accumulated over the years had completely fallen to Ye Tian.

Now, Ye Tian is undoubtedly not short of resources, relying on the resources of the Heavenly Shield Ancient Demon, the Heavenly Sword Ancient Demon, and other ancient demon-level powerhouses, he is enough to practice with peace of mind for countless years.

......

"The Ten Thousand Law Extreme Venerable is too terrifying, such a terrifying two top ultimate ancient demons were easily killed by him!"

Doomsday Extreme Venerable said in shock.

"The strength of the Ten Thousand Law Extreme Venerable should be invincible, or who is his opponent?" said the Shadow Sand Extreme Venerable excitedly.

With the invincible strength of the Ten Thousand Laws, even if those ultimate ancient demons all awakened, they would have to keep a low profile and not dare to trouble them.

They only need to hug the thighs of Wanfa 2.3 Extreme Venerable, and they can walk sideways.

It just so happened that they had a good relationship with Wanfa Jizun, and they helped Wanfa Jizun at the beginning, and they belonged to a friend relationship. []

So, they don't need to worry about it now.

And Ye Tian's battle with the Heavenly Shield Ancient Demon and the Heavenly Sword Ancient Demon was too terrifying, and it also made several Ultimate Ancient Demons wake up, but they were scared to death just by sensing it slightly.

The Heavenly Shield Ancient Demon and the Heavenly Sword Ancient Demon, the two ultimate ancient demons that were almost invincible when they joined forces, were easily killed.

The strength of the other party was comparable to that of the Duowei Ancient Demon, and what shocked them was that Ye Tian's clones were able to perform the seventh form, and after the fall, they only lost one clone, and the fall of the Duowei Ancient Demon was the real fall.

To a certain extent, Ye Tian is even more terrifying than the Duowei Ancient Demon!.
